ceo.name: Saad Aqeel
ceo.bio:
👤 Saad Aqeel — CEO & Founder of EcomXprt.

15+ years scaling eCommerce brands across Amazon, Walmart, and global marketplaces.

Saad founded EcomXprt with one mission: give every brand access to enterprise-level Amazon expertise.

Under his leadership:
• 250+ brands scaled
• Millions in annual ad spend managed
• Clients across US, UK, EU, UAE, CA, AUS

📞 +92 323 577 7900
📧 admin@ecomxprt.com

members.name: Ammar Jamil
members.shortBio: Co-architect of EcomXprt growth methodology. 12+ years in Amazon operations across US and EU.
members.extendedBio:
👤 Ammar Jamil — Co-Founder of EcomXprt.

12+ years in Amazon operations across US and EU markets.

Ammar co-architected EcomXprt's proprietary growth methodology — the systematic approach behind 250+ scaled brands.

He oversees client account strategy and our operations team.

members.name: Tayyab Sethi
members.shortBio: Expert in client onboarding and revenue consulting. Overseen $5M+ in client revenue.

members.name: Hammas Khalid
members.shortBio: Creative lead for A+ Content, Brand Stores, packaging. 200+ Amazon listing designs.

200+ Amazon listing designs and counting.

Hammas leads all creative work:

• Brand Store design

His designs have driven +118% average CVR improvement for our clients.

members.name: Asad Naeem
members.shortBio: Deep expertise in Seller Central operations, listing compliance, catalogue management, FBA.

members.name: Raja Souban
members.shortBio: Multi-marketplace specialist. Manages Walmart WFS, eBay Powerseller, and TikTok Shop.
members.extendedBio:
👤 Raja Souban — Multi-Marketplace Specialist.

Raja manages:
• Walmart (WFS, listings, Walmart Connect ads)
• eBay (Powerseller accounts, Cassini SEO)

If you want to expand beyond Amazon, Raja is your point of contact.

📞 +92 323 577 7900 | admin@ecomxprt.com

members.name: Moin
members.shortBio: PPC and ranking expert. Manages advanced Sponsored Ads campaigns with consistently high ROAS.
members.extendedBio:
👤 Moin — Amazon PPC Specialist.

Moin manages advanced Sponsored Ads campaigns across our client portfolio.

Specialty:
• Campaign architecture & restructuring
• Bid optimization & dayparting
• Search term mining
• ROAS maximization

Results: 7.2× ROAS, ACoS reduced from 28% to 11%.
